$comment: Storyblok component definitions for the slide-design-system. Push with scripts/push-storyblok-schema.mjs (requires STORYBLOK_SPACE_ID and STORYBLOK_MANAGEMENT_TOKEN). Components are tagged with `component_group_uuid` so they land in the right Storyblok group. The slideshow.Slides field uses `component_group_whitelist` so any new slide_* component dropped in this group becomes available to authors automatically. `repo_url` on each slide_* renders a small GitHub/GitLab mark in the bottom-right; leave blank to hide.

title_accent.description: Word(s) rendered in accent color / italic

repo_url.description: Repo URL — present for parity, but the title/closing layouts hide the bottom-right mark by design.
Optional GitHub/GitLab URL. Renders a small repo mark in the bottom-right of the slide. Leave blank to hide.

content.description: Raw shell transcript. Rendered as HTML — wrap tokens in <span class="…"> for color: prompt, host, cmd, flag, out, ok, err, url.

image.description: Optional image displayed inside the terminal window.

badge_text.description: Pill text shown on the right of the heading row.

vue_code.description: Single-file Vue component source. Sandbox-rendered in the stage. Use storyblok-code-block field below for plugin-assisted editing.

code_plugin.description: Optional: same Vue source via the storyblok-code-block plugin (overrides Vue Code if both are set).

fallback_html.description: Plain HTML rendered as a static fallback when Vue compilation fails or is disabled.

repo_url.description: Optional GitHub/GitLab URL. Renders a small repo mark in the bottom-right of the slide. Leave blank to hide.

vue_code.description: Vue source rendered live in the right pane and shown verbatim in the left pane.

code_plugin.description: Optional: same Vue source via the storyblok-code-block plugin (overrides Vue Code if both are set).

fallback_html.description: Plain HTML rendered as a static fallback when Vue compilation fails.

repo_url.description: Optional GitHub/GitLab URL. Renders a small repo mark in the bottom-right of the slide. Leave blank to hide.

owner.description: Initials shown in the row label.

progress_pct.description: Optional 0–100 progress fill rendered inside the bar.

bar_label.description: Short label inside the bar, e.g. "Build · ship".

months.default_value:
Jan
Feb
Mar
Apr
May
Jun
Jul
Aug
months.description: Column headers, one per line. Drives the number of grid columns.

today_pct.description: Position of the dashed TODAY line, % from left (0–100). Leave blank to hide.

repo_url.description: Optional GitHub/GitLab URL. Renders a small repo mark in the bottom-right of the slide. Leave blank to hide.

assignee_initials.description: 1–3 chars rendered inside the avatar circle.

count_label.description: Small count chip in the column header.

repo_url.description: Optional GitHub/GitLab URL. Renders a small repo mark in the bottom-right of the slide. Leave blank to hide.

icon.description: Single character shown in the icon circle.

lead_spacer.description: Flex value for the leading spacer (0 = none, 0.4 = small, 1 = full). Use to stagger lanes.

repo_url.description: Optional GitHub/GitLab URL. Renders a small repo mark in the bottom-right of the slide. Leave blank to hide.

who.description: Top label inside the event chip.

sprint_meta.description: e.g. "Apr 21–25 · day 7 of 10". HTML allowed for highlighted spans.

days.description: One day per line, format: "Label|Number|isToday" (isToday = true|false).

repo_url.description: Optional GitHub/GitLab URL. Renders a small repo mark in the bottom-right of the slide. Leave blank to hide.

value_suffix.description: Tiny suffix appended to the value, e.g. "mo".

alt.description: Use accent-2 fill on the bar.

period_label.description: Pill in the heading row, e.g. "Oct 1 — Dec 31".

hero_unit.description: Tiny unit shown after the number, e.g. "M".

hero_trend.description: Comma-separated y-points for the trend line (lower = up). 0–24 range.

hero_desc.description: Supporting paragraph below the hero number. <strong> tags are honoured.

repo_url.description: Optional GitHub/GitLab URL. Renders a small repo mark in the bottom-right of the slide. Leave blank to hide.

headline.description: Replaces the side-panel heading when this state is active. Defaults to the state name.

tier_label.description: Override for the panel eyebrow (e.g. "Top region"). Auto-derived from tier if blank.

description.description: Side-panel paragraph shown when this state is active.

default_state_id.description: 2-letter state code shown when no state is hovered (e.g. "NY").

panel_eyebrow_default.description: Eyebrow shown in the side panel before any state is hovered.

repo_url.description: Optional GitHub/GitLab URL. Renders a small repo mark in the bottom-right of the slide. Leave blank to hide.

code.description: Code rendered with the storyblok-code-block plugin (syntax-aware editor in Storyblok).
